# `bookings` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `BookingRequest`

```prisma
model BookingRequest {
  id              String          @id @default(uuid())
  clientId        String
  advisorId       String
  sessionType     String
  description     String?
  proposedDate    DateTime
  proposedTime    String
  duration        Int
  amount          Decimal         @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  status          String          @default("pending")
  rejectionReason String?
  createdAt       DateTime        @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime        @updatedAt
  session         AdvisorSession?
  advisor         User            @relation("BookingRequest_advisorIdToUser", fields: [advisorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  client          User            @relation("BookingRequest_clientIdToUser", fields: [clientId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([advisorId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([proposedDate])
  @@index([status])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
